label: Google Search
description: Run web searches via Google's Programmable Search Engine (Custom Search JSON API) using an API key and Search Engine ID.

form.title: Connect Google Search
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to query the web via Google's Custom Search JSON API.

methods.label: API Key + Search Engine ID
methods.description: Paste your Google Cloud API key (with Custom Search API enabled) and your Programmable Search Engine ID (cx). Quickest setup — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with an API Key and Search Engine ID

You need two things: a **Google Cloud API key** and a **Search Engine ID (cx)**.

### Part 1 — Get a Google Cloud API Key

1. Open [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) and select or create a project.
2. Go to **APIs & Services → Library**, search for **Custom Search API**, and click **Enable**.
3. Go to **APIs & Services → Credentials → Create credentials → API key**.
4. Copy the generated key. Optionally click **Edit API key** to restrict it to the Custom Search API for security.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

### Part 2 — Get your Search Engine ID (cx)

1. Open [Programmable Search Engine](https://programmablesearchengine.google.com/controlpanel/all).
2. Click **Add** (or open an existing engine).
3. Enter the sites to search or check **Search the entire web** for general web search.
4. After creation, click **Customize** on your engine, then go to the **Overview** tab.
5. Copy the **Search engine ID** value (labelled `cx`) and paste it into the **Search Engine ID** field below.

### Notes

- The free tier allows 100 queries per day. Additional queries cost $5 per 1,000 (up to 10,000/day).
- Billing must be enabled on your Google Cloud project to use the API beyond the free quota.
- If you restrict the key to specific IPs or referrers, make sure Anton's environment is whitelisted.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: From Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials. Must have the Custom Search API enabled on the same project.

fields.name: search_engine_id
fields.label: Search Engine ID (cx)
fields.description: From programmablesearchengine.google.com → your engine → Overview. Also called the cx parameter.

fields.name: num_results
fields.label: Default Results per Query
fields.description: Number of search results Anton fetches per query (max 10 per Google's API limit).

fields.name: safe_search
fields.label: Safe Search
fields.description: Controls Google's SafeSearch filtering for explicit content.
